name: recurring plan carries an RRULE recurrence token
description: A recurring plan ('gym every Monday at 6am') is a recurrence temporal token (kind=recurrence) with an iCalendar RRULE (docs/ANALYSIS.md: 'iCalendar RRULE encodes recurrence-kind temporal tokens'). The extraction emits the token in temporal_tokens so the real _upsert_tokens path persists it with its rrule; the fact references the recurrence via value_json. NOTE/LIMITATION: the harness snapshot (runner._snapshot) reads facts/reviews/entities only and does NOT surface temporal_tokens, so the RRULE is exercised but cannot be asserted directly here — the recurrence is pinned via the fact's value_json instead. resolved_start is the first occurrence absolute against created_at (2026-06-10 is a Wednesday, so the next Monday is 2026-06-15).

steps.body: New routine: gym every Monday at 6am.
